summaryPoints: 57 of 100 conversations are scored as bad quality.
Top intent is order_support with 40 conversations.
20 recommendation conversations led to user follow-through events.

recommendations.title: Compliance Risk: Missing Safety Framing
recommendations.description: 43 conversations include risk-sensitive claims without disclaimers.
rootCauses: Inconsistent application of safety protocols due to inadequate agent training
Insufficient contextual understanding leading to missed opportunities for risk-sensitive intent identification
Lack of real-time compliance monitoring and feedback mechanisms
suggestedActions: Develop and implement a comprehensive compliance training program for agents with regular refreshers and assessments
Integrate AI-powered intent detection tools to enhance early identification of risk-sensitive contexts and trigger targeted safety framing
Establish a real-time conversation review process with automated compliance checks and human evaluation to ensure consistent safety protocol application
recommendations.hypothesis: Automated safety framing will materially reduce compliance exposure.

recommendations.title: Low Recommendation Follow-Through
recommendations.description: Recommendation conversion is 4.7% for this widget.
rootCauses: Insufficient contextual understanding leading to mismatched recommendations
Lack of transparency in the recommendation algorithm eroding user trust
Inadequate feedback mechanisms to refine and improve recommendation accuracy
suggestedActions: Implement intent-based recommendation filtering with explicit user feedback loops
Develop and display confidence scores or explanation summaries for each recommended item
Conduct A/B testing on prominent call-to-action placements and formats to optimize user engagement
recommendations.hypothesis: Higher recommendation precision and clearer CTAs will improve conversion.

recommendations.title: Above-Baseline User Drop-Off
recommendations.description: 19.0% conversations dropped off, above this widget's dynamic risk threshold.
rootCauses: Insufficient personalized support in initial interactions, leading to user disengagement
Lack of clear and concise guidance from the assistant, causing confusion and drop-off
Inadequate understanding of user needs and preferences, resulting in unhelpful responses
suggestedActions: Implement intent-specific response templates with personalized elements, such as user names and context-dependent suggestions
Conduct A/B testing of concise versus detailed first responses, with a focus on improving clarity and relevance
Develop and integrate user feedback mechanisms to gauge satisfaction and identify areas for improvement in real-time
recommendations.hypothesis: Reducing first-turn friction will improve continuation and lower drop-off.
